name: devils-council
description: Persona-driven adversarial review council for plans, code, and RFCs. Staff Engineer, SRE, PM, Devil's Advocate + auto-triggered bench personas critique in parallel; Council Chair synthesizes contradictions without collapsing dissent.

gsd_integration.title: GSD integration
gsd_integration.description: Enable PostToolUse wrapping of gsd-plan-checker and gsd-code-reviewer agent outputs with a one-line devils-council pointer. Off by default. Requires GSD installed at ~/.claude/agents/gsd-plan-checker.md or ~/.claude/agents/gsd-code-reviewer.md (the hook is a no-op if GSD is absent). Toggle via /plugin config devils-council or by editing ~/.claude/settings.json.

shell_inject_guard.title: Shell-inject guard
shell_inject_guard.description: Enable PreToolUse dry-run pre-parser on commands/*.md edits. Blocks Write/Edit operations that introduce unauthorized inline !`<cmd>` or fenced ``` ! shell-inject patterns (class of bug that shipped as v1.0.0 P0). Allowlist: scripts/shell-inject-allowlist.txt + inline <!-- dc-shell-inject-ok: reason --> markers. Set to false to disable the hook (not recommended; CI step still enforces on push).
